_note: Project registry per docs/architecture/project-vault.md. Tracks every project Nick owns — AA-managed and external. Each entry maps to a repo and (optionally) a team. The single index of 'what projects exist'.

projects.name: Shared Workspaces
projects.description: Shared lightweight repo. Sub-folders by team or topic (wharfside-bulletins/, personal-assistant/, etc).

projects.name: Concurrent 3280 — Museum Report + Jersey Stack Video
projects.description: Museum-grade research report (InfoAge / VCF) plus Jersey Stack-style YouTube video on Concurrent's last great pre-RISC mini. Primary-source heavy; Nick co-op'd at Concurrent in 1985.
